# tests/fixtures

Golden oracle tensors that gate every kernel (ADR-002; formats frozen in ADR-005 and
`src/shared/contracts.zig`). Generated by `tools/make_fixtures.py`; loaded in Zig via
`src/shared/fixture.zig`. A kernel is DONE when it matches these within the manifest
tolerances — not when it "looks right".

| set | source | committed |
|---|---|---|
| `synthetic/` | 4-layer/8-expert Qwen3-MoE, seeded, Q8_0 baked into weights; includes matching `model.gguf` | yes (~9 MB) |
| `qwen3-30b-a3b/` | real Qwen3-30B-A3B-Instruct-2507 checkpoint | no (generated locally, GBs) |

Regenerate:

```sh
.venv/bin/python tools/make_fixtures.py --synthetic --out tests/fixtures/synthetic
.venv/bin/python tools/make_fixtures.py --hf ~/ds5-models/Qwen3-30B-A3B-Instruct-2507 \
    --out tests/fixtures/qwen3-30b-a3b --e2e   # slow; run where the download lives
```

Each set: `manifest.json` (cases, params, tolerances, prompts) + flat `.ds5t` tensor
files (64-byte header + raw little-endian data; `ne[0]` = contiguous dim). Regenerating
with schema/tolerance changes is a contract change — see ADR-005 §7.
